keywords: ML output validation guards count ceiling required modules recency learning plan skipped
ironRules: Count ceiling: apply at most min(3, FREEDOM config) changes — MACHINE ceiling of 3
Protected invariants: drop any suggestion that removes a required curriculum module
Recency guard: < 2 lessons since last adaptation → LearningPlanSkipped (not failure)
ML inference timeout → partialResults:true in successModes (not failureModes)
LearningPlanSkipped is a valid success — the plan is correct, not an error
